personalize.solution.CfnAbout: An object that provides information about a solution. A solution is a trained model that can be deployed as a campaign.

personalize.solution.DatasetGroupArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset group that provides the training data.

personalize.solution.EventType.Description: The event type (for example, 'click' or 'like') that is used for training the model. If no `eventType` is provided, Amazon Personalize uses all interactions for training with equal weight regardless of type.

personalize.solution.PerformAutoML.Description: We don't recommend enabling automated machine learning. Instead, match your use case to the available Amazon Personalize recipes. For more information, see [Determining your use case.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/personalize/latest/dg/determining-use-case.html) When true, Amazon Personalize performs a search for the best USER_PERSONALIZATION recipe from the list specified in the solution configuration (`recipeArn` must not be specified). When false (the default), Amazon Personalize uses `recipeArn` for training.

personalize.solution.PerformHPO.Description: Whether to perform hyperparameter optimization (HPO) on the chosen recipe. The default is `false`.

personalize.solution.RecipeArn.Description: The ARN of the recipe used to create the solution. This is required when `performAutoML` is false.

personalize.solution.SolutionConfig.Description: Describes the configuration properties for the solution.
